title: Environmental Fog Disable
description: Disable the environmental fog introduced in 1.21.6 via a toggleable setting.
body:
Environmental Fog Disable

Minecraft 1.21.6 introduced a new atmospheric fog system that adds a blueish-gray haze to your world, especially noticeable during rain and in certain biomes. This mod gives you control back by adding a simple toggle in your Video Settings.

Features:

Disables the blueish-gray atmospheric fog by default
Easy toggle: Options → Video Settings → Environmental Fog
Changes apply instantly - no restart needed
Your preference is saved automatically
Stop squinting through the haze and enjoy clear skies again! Simply enable the "Environmental Fog" option in video settings if you ever want the vanilla fog back.

Requirements:

Minecraft 1.21.6+
Fabric Loader
Fabric API
